title: What are Eva Characters Horoscope
wikitext:
[]: What are Eva Characters' Horoscope             Quote Post by StandardEvaFan » Sat Jun 21, 2008 9:50 pm Post your thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jun 21, 2008 11:26 pm Shinji (Gemini): Today, You're gonna be forced to pilot a giant robot, to fight a giant Angel, because your dad is a giant dick.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Jun 22, 2008 12:15 am Knowing how horoscopes work, Shinji would read that his day is gonna be an 8 out of 10. 10 being best. Then he's sortied against Ramiel later that day and gets boiled alive.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 22, 2008 2:08 am We have birth dates for most of the characters -- from there it's just a matter of cranking the handle. If you search around, Zuggy has drawn up a natal chart for Rei

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jun 22, 2008 5:39 am I'm not sure if the natal chart image is on the forum any longer. Pity if it's gone- it was one magnificent piece of work.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 22, 2008 10:27 am since im sure we have the pilots birthdays somewhere around here, we could look at archived horoscopes from their birthdays in the year that the events of NGE took place.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jun 22, 2008 10:45 am Kaworu: Today you will have to make an important decision. Be sure not to lose your head...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jun 22, 2008 10:58 am Mr. Tines wrote: We have birth dates for most of the characters
